title: MetaboLab--advanced NMR data processing and analysis for metabolomics.
author: Ludwig C Gunther UL
content:
S-EPMC3179975 PMC3179975 MetaboLab--advanced NMR data processing and analysis for metabolomics.

Background

Despite wide-spread use of Nuclear Magnetic Resonance (NMR) in metabolomics for the analysis of biological samples there is a lack of graphically driven, publicly available software
